tweets.text:
@HawkChainETH We're in a massive EML bottleneck right now and CW lasers are getting bottlenecked now too. 

To my knowledge, $COHR is buying EMLs off $LITE because they can't make enough. 

$LITE is majority allocated to EML, so they can't make enough CW lasers. 

So they're buying CW lasers
tweets.summaryEn: EML/CW laser bottleneck: COHR buys EMLs from LITE; both supply-constrained despite high demand.
